description: A clinical neuropsychologist needs a standardized automated report extracting clinical metrics from raw Finger Tapping Test (FTT) data located at ~/pebl/data/ftt_tap_data.csv. Filter out corrupted data showing hardware key-repeat artifacts (e.g., constant ITI ~33ms yielding >250 taps per 10s trial). For each valid participant, compute dominant_total_taps, nondominant_total_taps, dominant_mean_iti_ms, nondominant_mean_iti_ms, asymmetry_index_percent (((dominant_total_taps - nondominant_total_taps) / dominant_total_taps) * 100), and fatigue_index_percent (((dominant_trial_1_taps - dominant_trial_3_taps) / dominant_trial_1_taps) * 100). Generate a JSON report at ~/pebl/analysis/ftt_report.json containing a 'participants' array with metrics for valid entries and exclusion reasons for corrupted ones, along with 'group_mean_asymmetry_percent' and 'group_mean_fatigue_percent' across all valid participants.
